_meta.description: Sprite generation manifest for SpaceGame Phase C visual overhaul
_meta.style_guide: 16-bit pixel art, hard pixel edges, no antialiasing. Dark sci-fi space aesthetic. Existing game sprites use isometric 3/4 view for items, with vibrant but not oversaturated colors on dark backgrounds. Palette: cyans/blues for tech, warm oranges/browns for ores, greens for organic, purples for rare/exotic.
_meta.backend_strategy: NanoBanano for high-value/large sprites (grid objects, backgrounds, forge). Gemini 2.5 Flash for small icons and functional sprites. No DALL-E.
_meta.size_strategy: Grid objects at 32x32 (displayed at 2-3x in 80px cells). Icons at 16x16 (displayed at 2-3x in UI). Backgrounds at native display size.
_meta.prompt_notes: Mining rocks: top-down perspective for grid placement. Commodity icons: isometric 3/4 view to match existing sprites. All sprites should have transparent or solid-color backgrounds (pipeline handles removal).

sprites._section: === MINING: Rock Sprites (32x32, displayed in 80px grid cells) ===

sprites.prompt: 32x32 pixel art sprite of a rough gray-brown asteroid rock chunk. Rocky, irregular shape with visible cracks and dark shadows. Muted earth tones: charcoal gray, warm brown, dark tan. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background, limited 12-color palette.

32x32 pixel art sprite of an iron-rich asteroid rock. Dark gray stone with reddish-brown metallic veins running through it, subtle rust-colored highlights. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background, limited 12-color palette.

32x32 pixel art sprite of a crystalline asteroid rock. Dark stone base with bright cyan crystal formations growing from the surface, glowing blue-white highlights. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background, limited 12-color palette.

32x32 pixel art sprite of a rare glowing asteroid rock. Dark stone with iridescent purple veins and magenta energy glow emanating from cracks, precious and exotic look. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background, limited 12-color palette.

32x32 pixel art sprite of a dull metallic asteroid chunk. Silver-gray surface with riveted, industrial look, like raw hull plating. Muted steel tones. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background, limited 12-color palette.

32x32 pixel art sprite of a precious metallic asteroid chunk. Gold-tinged surface with bright white highlight reflections, veins of valuable metal visible. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background, limited 12-color palette.

32x32 pixel art sprite of a dangerously cracked asteroid rock glowing red-orange from internal heat. Deep fissures with molten lava visible inside, warning colors. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background, limited 12-color palette.

32x32 pixel art sprite of a dark asteroid rock with toxic green gas venting from cracks and holes. Wisps of green vapor escaping, porous surface. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background, limited 12-color palette.
16x16 pixel art sprite of a small basic mining drone. Simple boxy chassis with a single blue indicator light, two stubby arms. Dark metal body. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.
16x16 pixel art sprite of a medium mining drone. Sleeker angular chassis with green indicator lights, articulated drill arms. Silver-gray body. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.
16x16 pixel art sprite of an advanced elite mining drone. Compact body with glowing purple energy field, multiple precision arms, high-tech look. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.

sprites._section: === SALVAGE: Cell States (32x32, displayed in grid cells) ===

32x32 pixel art sprite of a spent, empty hull panel. Dark, burned-out interior, scorch marks, completely depleted. Very dark charcoal and ash tones. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, no antialiasing, transparent background.
20x20 pixel art sprite of a thin gray border frame for an item quality indicator. Simple dull gray outline, empty transparent center. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.

20x20 pixel art sprite of a clean white border frame for an item quality indicator. Crisp white outline with subtle inner highlight, empty transparent center. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.

20x20 pixel art sprite of a glowing blue border frame for an item quality indicator. Bright blue outline with cyan inner glow, empty transparent center. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.

20x20 pixel art sprite of a shining gold ornate border frame for an item quality indicator. Bright gold outline with white sparkle accents, empty transparent center. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.
16x16 pixel art icon of a magnifying glass with blue scan pulse lines radiating outward. Sci-fi scanner tool. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.
16x16 pixel art icon of a mechanical extraction claw, orange metallic with grip pincers. Sci-fi salvage tool. Style: retro pixel art, transparent background.

Pixel art top-down view of a derelict spaceship cargo bay interior. Dark and abandoned, scattered cargo crates and broken containers, flickering emergency red lights, debris on the floor. Moody dark sci-fi atmosphere with steel blue and rust orange accents. Style: 16-bit retro pixel art, limited color palette, 160x120 pixels.

Pixel art top-down view of a derelict spaceship laboratory interior. Dark and abandoned, shattered glass tubes, overturned equipment, chemical spills glowing green on the floor, broken screens. Eerie sci-fi atmosphere with teal and toxic green accents. Style: 16-bit retro pixel art, limited color palette, 160x120 pixels.

Pixel art top-down view of a derelict spaceship engine room interior. Dark and abandoned, massive pipes and cooling vents, sparking exposed wires, dim orange emergency glow from failing systems. Industrial sci-fi atmosphere with dark gray and warning orange accents. Style: 16-bit retro pixel art, limited color palette, 160x120 pixels.

48x48 pixel art sprite of a sci-fi forge furnace in idle state. Metallic frame with pipes, vents, and a viewport showing a dim orange ember glow inside. Space station industrial equipment. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, transparent background, limited color palette.

48x48 pixel art sprite of a sci-fi forge furnace in active smelting state. Same metallic frame as idle but viewport shows bright blazing orange-yellow flame, heat distortion lines, sparks flying upward. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, transparent background, limited color palette.

48x48 pixel art sprite of a sci-fi forge furnace in completion state. Same metallic frame but viewport shows bright white flash of completed synthesis, steam venting from sides. Style: retro 16-bit pixel art, hard edges, transparent background, limited color palette.
